ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document type */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the document */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was posted */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., PDF) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analysis_codes ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_doc_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type (e.g., Bill Analysis) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the document type (e.g., legislative, meeting notes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_codes" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "analysis_code" TEXT /* Code associated with the analysis (e.g., S 586) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., bill analysis, policy analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the document (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user when accessing the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., legislator, aide, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the meeting */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the meeting took place */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the meeting discussions */,
  "minutes" TEXT /* Minutes of the meeting */,
  "attendees" TEXT /* List of attendees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the attachment relates to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the attachment */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attachment file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "response_to" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being responded to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of this version's creation */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislative_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislative session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the legislative session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the legislative session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the legislative session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_session" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legislative session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id", "session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_department" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "department")
)
